The '''XQ3 Platform''' was a space installation built by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was designed for medium-sized vessels to be able to dock with. The design was bought by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]].

{{Station-stub}}
